privileged_info_summary: The task requires scaling a Flask API service to exactly 3 replicas behind an Nginx load balancer at project directory /home/ga/scaling-app with port 8080. The Flask service requires removal of container_name and fixed port mappings to enable scaling. Verification output must be saved to verification.txt. All software dependencies (Flask 3.0.0, redis-py 5.0.1, python:3.11-slim, nginx:alpine, redis:alpine) are real public packages/images, not synthetic. The Nginx configuration must be updated to use Docker's embedded DNS resolver at 127.0.0.11 to route requests across replicas. Verification requires at least 2 unique container hostnames in curl responses and functional Redis state sharing across replicas.
